name: Hanging By a Thread
description:
As you reach for your next handhold, the rock comes loose and tumbles down,
down, down to the ground.  You barely manage to save yourself by clinging
desperately to the rock face with your other hand.  Returning back west is out
of the question, but you might be able to pull yourself upwards onto a very
thin ledge.

extra_descriptions.description: The ledge is very narrow, perhaps two feet at it's widest part.
